title: Thoughts of a Ducky
description:
Adds:
-A villager that can trade wood called the adventurer
-A new crafting recipe that makes it so if you make bricks, you can surround it by 8 nether rack and get 8 nether bricks
-Advancement when you make a world.
Have fun :)
body:
I was thinking there were things that needed to be added so i added them:  
- A new villager called The Adventurer  
- An advancement for when you start a world (i think it works)  
- A crafting recipe for bricks that make you surround 8 netherrack around 1 brick for 8 nether bricks
